paths.name: BPSC (Bihar Public Service Commission)
paths.hook: Prepare for administrative, police, and revenue officer posts in Bihar state government.

paths.name: UPSC CSE (IAS / IPS / IFS)
paths.hook: India's premier civil service exam for top administrative, police, and diplomatic leadership roles.

paths.name: SSC (Staff Selection Commission)
paths.hook: Central government recruitment for various group B and C non-gazetted technical and non-technical posts.

paths.name: SSC CGL (Combined Graduate Level)
paths.hook: Recruitment for top central inspector, assistant section officer, and auditor roles in ministries.

paths.name: SSC CHSL (Combined Higher Secondary Level)
paths.hook: Gateway for postal assistants, sorting assistants, and data entry operators in central departments.

paths.name: Banking (IBPS, SBI PO)
paths.hook: Become a Probationary Officer or specialist manager in India's top public sector banks.

paths.name: NDA (National Defence Academy)
paths.hook: Enter the Indian Army, Navy, and Air Force as a prestigious commissioned officer right after 10+2.

paths.name: UPSC CSE IAS
paths.hook: India's premier administrative service commanding district administration, public policy formulation, and high-level government governance.

paths.name: SSC GD Constable
paths.hook: General duty paramedical and armed defense units securing international borders and maintaining internal sovereign peace.

paths.name: NDA Armed Forces Cadre
paths.hook: National Defence Academy executive officer pipeline creating future military commanders for Army, Navy, and Air Force.

paths.name: Indian Navy Fleet Commander
paths.hook: Navigating maritime combat fleets, nuclear submarines, and naval aviation assets across strategic oceanic territories.

paths.name: CRPF Commando & Commandant
paths.hook: Central Reserve Police Force specialized tactical units spearheading internal security and counter-insurgency operations.

paths.name: CISF Industrial Security Chief
paths.hook: Securing critical national economic infrastructure including international airports, aerospace ports, and nuclear installations.

paths.name: SSB Border Intelligence Commander
paths.hook: Securing strategic friendly borders and executing regional counter-intelligence and anti-smuggling tactical mandates.

paths.name: RAW External Counter-Intell Operative
paths.hook: Research and Analysis Wing elite foreign intelligence operatives defending national geopolitical interests worldwide.

paths.name: Bank Clerk & Cash Administrator
paths.hook: Core banking transaction management, financial customer service, and daily liquidity tracking for banking institutions.
